preMetabolizer 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

Package overview

preMetabolizer preMetabolizer-package
preMetabolizer: Prepare data for stream metabolism modeling

Data access

Download and read meteorological and hydrological data from external sources.

download_ghcnh()
Download GHCNh CSV files
read_ghcnh()
Read GHCNh CSV files
get_nasa_data()
Download NASA POWER hourly data
get_usgs_elev()
Get elevation from the USGS Elevation Point Query Service
get_noaa_stations()
Get NOAA station information
closest_noaa_stations()
Find NOAA stations near a location
ks_meso_vars()
Fetch Kansas Mesonet variable metadata
get_ks_meso()
Fetch Data from Kansas Mesonet
read_ks_meso()
Read Cached Kansas Mesonet Data
ks_meso_stations()
Get Kansas Mesonet Station Information
ks_meso_station_activity()
Get Kansas Mesonet Station Activity
ks_meso_most_recent()
Get Most Recent Kansas Mesonet Data Timestamp
ks_meso_fw13()
Get Kansas Mesonet FW13 Data
read_shp()
Read Shapefile or Zipped Shapefile

Chemistry calculations

Calculate dissolved gas concentrations, solubility constants, and related thermodynamic quantities.

calc_O2sat()
Calculate Dissolved Oxygen Saturation
calc_CO2_molKg()
Calculate CO2 Concentration from Sensor Data
calc_CO2_mgL()
Calculate CO2 Concentration from Sensor Data
calc_K0()
Calculate Solubility Constant (K0) for CO2 in Water
calc_vapor_press()
Calculate the vapor pressure of water at the supplied conditions
xCO2_to_pCO2()
Convert Mole Fraction of CO2 (xCO2) to Partial Pressure (pCO2)
pCO2_to_xCO2()
Convert p(CO2) to x(CO2)

Physical property calculations

Calculate water density, depth from pressure, and solar radiation.

calc_water_density()
Calculate Water Density
calc_water_height()
Calculate Water Height from Sensor and Atmospheric Pressure
calc_light()
Calculate modeled light from solar.time
calc_solar_insolation()
Model solar insolation on a horizontal surface (W/m2 == J/s/m2) as in http://education.gsfc.nasa.gov/experimental/July61999siteupdate/inv99Project.Site/Pages/solar.insolation.html

Statistical utilities

Descriptive statistics and outlier detection for time series data.

calc_bin_width()
Calculate histogram bin width
calc_cv()
Calculate Coefficient of Variation
calc_mode()
Calculate the Mode(s) of a Vector
calc_exceedance_prob()
Calculate Flow Exceedence Probabilities
rcpp_calc_exceedance_prob()
Calculate Flow Exceedance Probabilities with C++
flag_z()
Flag Outliers Using Robust Z-Scores

Unit conversion

Convert between common units used in hydrology and atmospheric science.

convert_flow()
Convert Stream Discharge Between Units
convert_pressure()
Convert Barometric Pressure Between Units
convert_pressure_to_atm()
Convert Barometric Pressure to Atmospheres
correct_bp()
Correct Barometric Pressure for Elevation Change

Time utilities

Work with meteorological seasons and solar time.

get_season()
Determine the Season from a Date
even_timesteps()
Get evenly spaced time steps for logger data
convert_UTC_to_solartime()
Convert UTC Time to Mean or Apparent Solar Time
convert_solartime_to_UTC()
Convert DateTime from Local Solar Time to UTC

Data

Built-in reference datasets.

french_creek
French Creek Stream Metabolism Data
kings_discharge
Kings Creek daily water data

On this page

Developed by Connor Brown.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
